description_long: This is a tall, rectangular cabinet with a light wood finish and a modern, minimalist design. The front features two large, flat doors in a smooth, light gray or white color, concealing the lower half of the unit. The upper half consists of four open shelves, providing ample space for storage or display. The sides and top are finished in a natural wood grain pattern, giving the piece a contemporary yet warm appearance. The cabinet stands on four short, angled legs, elevating it slightly off the ground. The overall construction suggests it is suitable for use in urban environments such as offices, lobbies, or residential entryways.
description: A tall, modern cabinet with two front doors and four open shelves above, finished in light wood and white. It stands on short, angled legs and combines concealed and open storage.
description_view_0: Front view showing two large, flat doors covering the lower half, with no visible handles.
description_view_1: Side view displaying the full height and wood grain finish, with no visible openings or shelves.
description_view_2: Rear view revealing four open shelves above the closed cabinet section, with the interior wood finish visible.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, similar to view 1, showing the wood grain and the cabinet's depth.
